taskType.title: Task types
taskType.prefixHint: Unique prefix for reference numbers (e.g. PLB, ELC, MNT) — letters and digits only.
taskType.prefixError: Letters and digits only (no dashes or spaces)
taskType.templateHint: If set, its sections and fields appear automatically when creating/editing a work order of this type.
taskType.processHint: Work orders of this type will follow this process's steps. Leave empty to use the default process.

addressType.title: Address types
addressType.predominantHint: The field marked as predominant is displayed prominently in lists and work order details.
